'''chashaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiomorph|enantiomorph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiomorph|enantiomorph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chashaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshæzæth|chæshæzæth]] || [[word:chæshæzæj|chæshæzæj]] || [[word:chæshæzæsh|chæshæzæsh]] || [[word:chæshæzæ|chæshæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashashazath|chashashazath]] || [[word:chashashazaj|chashashazaj]] || [[word:chashashazash|chashashazash]] || [[word:chashashaza|chashashaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashazath|chashazath]] || [[word:chashazaj|chashazaj]] || [[word:chashazash|chashazash]] || [[word:chashaza|chashaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashafzath|chashafzath]] || [[word:chashafzaj|chashafzaj]] || [[word:chashafzash|chashafzash]] || [[word:chashafzaf|chashafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashazatha|chashazatha]] || [[word:chashazaja|chashazaja]] || [[word:chashazasha|chashazasha]] || [[word:chashazaka|chashazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashazath|chashazath]] || [[word:chashazaj|chashazaj]] || [[word:chashazash|chashazash]] || [[word:chashaza|chashaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashazathal|chashazathal]] || [[word:chashazajal|chashazajal]] || [[word:chashazashal|chashazashal]] || [[word:chashazakal|chashazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashazathatha|chashazathatha]] || [[word:chashazajaja|chashazajaja]] || [[word:chashazashasha|chashazashasha]] || [[word:chashazaka|chashazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashazathan|chashazathan]] || [[word:chashazajan|chashazajan]] || [[word:chashazashan|chashazashan]] || [[word:chashazakan|chashazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashazathaoro|chashazathaoro]] || [[word:chashazajaoro|chashazajaoro]] || [[word:chashazashaoro|chashazashaoro]] || [[word:chashazakaoro|chashazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
